title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Yotei**
*2025*
A Machi building game of forest, mountains, and potatoes.
![Yotei](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_2a901281.png)

2. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_64bf9d92.png)

3. **Regicide Legacy**
*2025*
Defeat corrupted enemies and unlock rewards over 12 challenging missions.
![Regicide Legacy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_33d5682c.jpg)

4. **Dungeon Crawler Carl: Unstoppable**
*2026*
The beloved solo/co-op card-crafting game, now with Dungeon Crawler Carl!
![Dungeon Crawler Carl: Unstoppable](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_27771234.png)

5. **20 Strong**
*2023*
A modular solo adventure system featuring 20 dice integrated in unique ways.
![20 Strong](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_4ac4e48f.png)

6. **Lairs**
*2026*
Build a devious dungeon and explore your rival's creation. 
![Lairs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_8f3f540b.jpg)

7. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_d25b3d5c.jpg)

8. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_db7c1bc3.png)

9. **Goa**
*2004*
Run a spice trade business in colonial-era India in this closed-loop economy game.
![Goa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_6c61646b.jpg)

10. **Regicide**
*2020*
Work together as brave adventurers to defeat the corrupted monarchy.
![Regicide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_29df5fe2.jpg)

11. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_ebe7887a.png)

12. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_6454d74b.jpg)

13. **Unstoppable**
*2025*
Gather your allies and sharpen your skills, for the darkest days are yet to come.
![Unstoppable](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_e45744ee.jpg)

14. **Ostia**
*2022*
1-4 players create trade routes in the Mediterranean using a mancala/resource system!
![Ostia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_144a797b.jpg)

15. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_702fb68c.jpg)

16. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_e7f51dfd.jpg)

17. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_98c30e80.png)

18. **Tamashii: Chronicle of Ascend**
*2023*
Become an outsider and fight against Ascend, a cold AI, that rules over the world.
![Tamashii: Chronicle of Ascend](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_337f08b3.png)

19. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_15563e49.jpg)

20. **Onward**
*2025*
Draft champions, slay monsters, and rally minions to destroy the enemy Nexus.
![Onward](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_779762ce.jpg)

21. **Barrage: Earned Authority**
*2026*
Sixteen innovative community-driven Executive Officers.
![Barrage: Earned Authority](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_f2bed072.png)

22. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_972caac6.jpg)

23. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_0f07a697.jpg)

24. **Excursions**
*2027*
Carefully plan itineraries to thrill guests on out-of-this-world vacations.
![Excursions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_a6f80a98.jpg)

25. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_2b9afb0c.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*15 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_f8cee74c.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*23 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_d4f84a36.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*18 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_aff89d8f.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*51 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_479a51eb.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*87 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_fc69ccfe.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*11 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_b152dfba.png)

7. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*40 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_aa7c5e82.jpg)

8. **Azul**
*101 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_8bfb5e90.png)

9. **Terraforming Mars**
*114 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_3a1fd5b2.jpg)

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*33 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_77dc0b06.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*30 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_b5cfb119.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*56 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_ea36914e.jpg)

13. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*63 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_92457b3b.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*16 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_85a363b3.jpg)

15. **Faraway**
*23 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_a426b76f.png)

16. **Sky Team**
*30 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_ea6b7155.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*2 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_ade7a763.jpg)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*2 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_6ecf9d85.png)

19. **The Gang**
*9 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_1f9a3df5.jpg)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*9 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_86c0c15b.jpg)

21. **The White Castle**
*29 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_4cc64a6b.jpg)

22. **Carcassonne**
*273 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_e8a962fb.jpg)

23. **Toy Battle**
*2 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_a36e1a20.jpg)

24. **Brass: Birmingham**
*16 months on the list*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_188b513e.jpg)

25. **Splendor**
*143 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-17/toplist/bgg_8ca8dea3.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com
